narrative:
Jackson Twp township has 1,525 registered voters, with 65.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.4 percentage points.
